chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 528 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.354/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.7676/2023 (R/Surety) 22.01.2024 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for applicant/surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This application has been filed by applicant Muhammad Rizwan seeking return of surety. It appears that accused Akhtiar Ahmed was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 08.08.2023 subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original Special Savings Certificate of Rs.50,000/-. Thereafter, instant bail has been dismissed as not pressed vide order dated 11.09.2023 on the ground that accused has been acquitted by the trial Court through on the basis of compromise. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in other matters, waives notice of this application and extends his no objection for granting the same. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
